rulings.Case Title: JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION VS. SUCCESSOR TRUSTEE OF THE MARY L. ELLIS 2004 TRUST ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO STRIKE 3RD AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, July 13, 2018, Line 1. CROSS DEFENDANT JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION'S MOTION TO STRIKE 3RD AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT. DENIED, moot. =(501/CPK)

rulings.Case Title: JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION VS. SUCCESSOR TRUSTEE OF THE MARY L. ELLIS 2004 TRUST ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To Amend To Add New Causes Of Action
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, July 13, 2018, Line 1. DEFENDANT ARLEEN ELLIS' Motion For Leave To Amend To Add New Causes Of Action. GRANTED. Requests for leave to amend are liberally granted where no prejudice is shown. Parties stipulated to a trial continuance and there is sufficient time to conduct any additional discovery. Moving party shall obtain an order continuing trial in Department 206 no later than July 20, 2018. Thereafter, by no later than July 20, 2018 Cross-Complainant shall file and serve a Fourth Amended Cross-Complaint. Cross-Complainant shall allege facts, not conclusions, to support standing under UCL claim, i.e. loss of money and/or property. Conclusory allegations that Cross-Complaint was damaged in an amount to be determined at trial, or that Cross-Defendant holds unspecified funds, asset, benefits and withholds rights are not sufficient. (e.g. Proposed Third Amended Cross-Complaint paragraphs 25 and 33). All amendments relevant to UCL claims shall be in ALL CAPS. This motion will be heard at 9:30 a.m. in Department 318. =(501/CPK)

rulings.Case Title: MARIA LABITORIA VS. ERLINDA SELMA ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, July 13, 2018, Line 6. DEFENDANT ERLINDA SELMA'S MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS. DENIED. Moving party fails to cite any authority for the proposition that Court's lacks jurisdiction in the absence of proper verification. Additionally, verification is sufficient. =(501/REQ)
